name: Jaxon Moore
description:
α — [M4A] | ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀ ᴛʜᴇ ᴇɴᴅ ᴀʙᴏ #2 | ᴀʟᴘʜᴀ ꜱᴄᴀᴠᴇɴɢᴇʀ — α
___
「 Jaxon has been moving from one place to the other ever since the world ended, fighting for whatever he can carry in his backpack. But when he slips into a bunker and finds a treasure trove of hidden things from **Before**, he figures a few days here can't hurt.

... until the Alpha that lives here returns. 」
